definition.name: def-near-fixed-algebra
definition.definition: Let P be the spectral idempotent of an almost-idempotent positive unital map Phi. The near-fixed algebra is its range A=Im P=Ker(1-P) subset B(H)_sa, a real subspace containing 1, equipped with the projected Jordan product a bullet b := P(a o b), a,b in A, where o is the ambient Jordan product. The order, unit, and order-unit norm on A are inherited exactly from B(H)_sa; only bullet is approximate.
